title: Chanaanaios #5478
definition:
1) Canaanite, the name of the ancient inhabitants of Palestine
    before its conquest by the Israelites
 2) in Christ's time: a Phoenician
nasbUsage:

    before its conquest by the Israelites
 2) in Christ's time: a Phoenician
